reviews.comment:
Dos filas para el mismo pedido. Una pérdida de tiempo. Para comprar un café tenés que pagar en un lugar y hacer otra fila para retirarlo. No hay un sistema de comandas internas y el usuario pierde el doble de tiempo.

(Translated by Google)
Two lines for the same order. A waste of time. To buy a coffee, you have to pay in one place and wait in another line to pick it up. There's no internal ordering system, and customers waste twice as much time.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMycXZtYmpRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Buen servicio y espacio verde para almorzar o tomar mate .
La parrilla zafa, precios normales para ruta y la chica que atiende muy atenta

(Translated by Google)
Good service and a green space for lunch or drinking mate. The grill is decent, prices are normal for a roadside restaurant, and the waitress is very attentive.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMycXVUOE93EAE

reviews.comment:
Qué en temporada hagan diferencia... No sé. Funcionado tres expendedoras de combustible, no pueden tener una exclusiva para los lugareños. Falta de criterio. Caro y bastante sucio. Trataré de evitarla en el futuro

(Translated by Google)
That they make a difference during peak season... I don't know. With three gas stations operating, they can't have one exclusively for locals. Lack of judgment. Expensive and quite dirty. I'll try to avoid it in the future.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMyeXVEcEVBEAE

reviews.comment:
Excelente atención.. comimos en la parrilla y nos fuimos contentos!!

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service! We ate at the grill and left happy!

reviews.comment:
Muy lindo lugar. Los baños de la estación de servicio, lo mantienen limpio, y la atención en general es buena. Próxima a la estación hay un pequeño parque para sentarse al aire libre y una plaza con juegos para los más pequeños.

(Translated by Google)
Very nice place. The restrooms at the gas station are kept clean, and the service is generally good. Near the station, there's a small park for outdoor seating and a playground for children.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMyZ3VlMXpBRRAB

reviews.comment:

A "mandatory" stop if traveling on Route 2, it's fully equipped with food and drinks, and has clean restrooms.
